name: Blender Bridge (WASM)
description: Export entities to Blender scenes, sync character/location data as Blender properties, and trigger renders from Studio.
author: BiloxiStudios

blender_path.label: Blender Executable Path
blender_path.description: Full path to the Blender executable (e.g. C:/Program Files/Blender Foundation/Blender 4.0/blender.exe)

blender_port.label: Blender RPC Port
blender_port.description: Port for the Blender command server addon

output_dir.label: Render Output Directory
output_dir.description: Directory where Blender renders are saved

auto_export.label: Auto-export on Entity Update
auto_export.description: Automatically re-export entity data to Blender when saved
